name: MOLINA HEALTHCARE, INC.
summary: OVERVIEW ABOUT MOLINA HEALTHCARE Molina Healthcare, Inc., a FORTUNE 500 company, provides managed healthcare services under the Medicaid and Medicare programs, and through the state insurance marketplaces (the Marketplace). Molina was founded in 1980 as a provider organization serving low-income families in Southern California and reincorporated in Delaware in 2002.
